transcript: I want to reschedule my appointment.
response_text: Sure. What date and time would you prefer?

vad.note: Trimmed with simple RMS threshold; use Silero VAD for stronger production comparison.

asr.transcript: I want to reschedule my appointment.
asr.note: Used provided transcript so the rest of the pipeline can run without ASR setup.

agent.response_text: Sure. What date and time would you prefer?
agent.note: Used deterministic fallback; set GEMINI_API_KEY to use Gemini.

tts.text: Sure. What date and time would you prefer?
tts.note: Generated AIFF with macOS say, then converted to WAV with afconvert.
